subcodes.first_line: O luminous youth! Be merciful and celestial; be of the Kingdom and divine. Rest not for a moment if thou canst [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جوان نورانی رحمانی باش و آسمانی ملکوتی باش و ربانی تا توانی دمی میاسا و
subcodes.subjects: @teaching one's self first in teaching the Cause, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God
